sample: all 48 studies entering the numeric-gain analysis; blind second coding from dossiers, 2026-07-17 (pre-adjudication agreement)
resolution: All disagreements were adjudicated by the review team against the primary full text; adjudicated values carry a dated note in the coded database. Adjudication changed 5 of 48 B scores and 7 of 48 extracted gains; two gains (a learning-curve metric and a prediction-accuracy metric) were removed under the scheduling-objective eligibility rule, so 46 studies enter the gain analysis.
